name_en: Premium original leather M25255 Black mini This Capucines BB bag is made of matte Taurillon cowhide leather with metal hardware, showcasing a sharp style. The flap offers two styles: external or internal. The neat interior features multiple pockets. Adjust the shoulder strap for a crossbody option. Dimensions: 21 × 14 × 8 cm
